stages.name: Campaign — Acts 1–10
objectives: Complete Acts 1–10 and kill Act 10 Kitava
Collect all 24 passive skill points from quests (use the Quest Tracker tab)
Complete Normal Lab (Act 3) for first 2 Ascendancy points
Complete Cruel Lab (Act 6 or later) for 3rd and 4th Ascendancy points
Maintain 75%+ fire, cold, and lightning resistances throughout the campaign
stages.gear_targets: ~100 life per act; 75% all elemental resists by Act 6
key_warnings: Act 5 Kitava kill: permanent −30% all elemental resistances
Act 10 Kitava kill: another permanent −30% (total −60% from both Kitavas)
stages.unlock: Access to Maps and Atlas via The Templar Laboratory (after Act 10)
stages.next_step: Complete your first Atlas maps and unlock Atlas Passives

stages.name: Early Atlas — White Maps (Tier 1–5)
objectives: Run Tier 1–5 (white) maps to open the Atlas and unlock Atlas passive points
Complete Atlas bonus objectives to earn bonus points (shown on map completion)
Identify and run your first Strongboxes, Shrines, and league mechanics
Pick up your first Atlas Passive points from Kirac's missions
stages.gear_targets: 5,000+ life or equivalent ES; capped elemental resistances; any damage that clears white maps in under 60s
key_warnings: Do not run maps with more than 6% IIQ until damage feels comfortable
Avoid 'Cannot Regenerate Life/Mana' map mod until sustain is established
stages.unlock: Tier 6+ (yellow) maps after sufficient Tier 1–5 completions
stages.next_step: Progress into yellow maps and unlock Conqueror encounters

stages.name: Yellow Maps (Tier 6–10) & Conquerors
objectives: Complete Tier 6–10 maps to unlock Conqueror encounters (Baran, Veritania, Al-Hezmin, Drox)
Encounter and kill each Conqueror in their region to earn Conqueror Splinters
Sustain map supply by running 3 maps for each one you use
Spec into Atlas passives for your chosen farming strategy (scarab, map quantity, etc.)
Open a Zana mission each day for bonus maps and atlas completion
stages.gear_targets: 5,500–6,000 life; clear speed to run T8 maps in 2–3 minutes; at least one reliable defensive layer beyond resistances
key_warnings: Conquerors can be killed if encountered before you are ready — losing the encounter resets the cycle
Each Conqueror must be fought in their respective Atlas region (shown by symbol on Atlas)
stages.unlock: Tier 11+ (red) maps; Sirus encounter (after all 4 Conquerors killed once each)
stages.next_step: Push into red maps and complete the Conqueror cycle for the Watchstone system

stages.name: Red Maps (Tier 11–16) & Sirus
objectives: Complete Tier 11–16 red maps consistently
Kill all 4 Conquerors again to spawn Sirus (Awakener of Worlds) at the centre of the Atlas
Farm Atlas completion — aim for 100+ unique map completions for maximum Atlas passive points
Run Exarch and Eater of Worlds encounters for Maven Invitations and Orbs of Conflict
Begin collecting Maven Invitations from witnessed bosses (Maven follows you from T6+)
stages.gear_targets: 6,000+ life; damage clear in under 90s per T16; one-shot protection from a guard skill or Immortal Call
key_warnings: Sirus deals heavy Chaos damage — 20%+ chaos resistance strongly recommended
Conquerors' Exarch and Eater spawn in Tier 14+ maps only
Maven's Crucible (multi-boss arena) requires all 3 witnesses to die simultaneously
stages.unlock: Maven encounter; Shaper and Elder chains; Uber lab (ilvl 75+ area level requirement)
stages.next_step: Unlock and challenge the Pinnacle bosses: Shaper, Elder, Maven, and Uber pinnacles

stages.name: Pinnacle Content
objectives: Collect Shaper Guardian map fragments (4 maps) to open The Shaper's Realm
Collect Elder Guardian map fragments and Uber Elder fragments to fight the Uber Elder
Collect Maven's Writ from witnessed boss encounters for The Maven fight
Kill Sirus at Awakening Level 8 for the full loot table (including Watcher's Eye chance)
Run Eternal Labyrinth for the final two Ascendancy points and the best Enchantments
Complete Ultimatum encounters for Fragments and crafting currency
stages.gear_targets: 7,000+ life or 10,000+ ES; 200M+ DPS (PoB) for comfortable pinnacle kills; full ailment immunity or suppression
key_warnings: The Maven fight has extremely punishing memory game mechanics — learn the fight before attempting
Uber Elder requires both Shaper and Elder to die at nearly the same time — bring high burst DPS
Sirus AL8 awakening beam is a one-shot; position away from blue fire storms at all times
stages.unlock: Uber versions of pinnacle bosses (require special fragments from their non-uber versions)
stages.next_step: Farm pinnacles for mirror-tier drops, or push into Uber Shaper/Elder/Maven/Sirus

stages.name: Uber Pinnacle & Endgame Farming
objectives: Defeat Uber Shaper, Uber Elder, Uber Maven, Uber Sirus, Uber Exarch, and Uber Eater
Establish a consistent farming strategy: Ritual, Legion, Expedition, Delirium, or Blight
Target-farm specific unique items or mirror-tier bases for build completion
Run full Simulacrum (300 Delirium Splinters) for jewels and cluster jewels
Craft or purchase endgame gear upgrades: Awakened gems, Cluster Jewels, Watcher's Eye
stages.gear_targets: 8,000+ life or 15,000+ ES for Uber bosses; Awakened gems at level 5; damage to clear Uber pinnacles in 30–90 seconds
key_warnings: Uber bosses hit significantly harder than their base versions — one failed defensive layer can be lethal
Delirium Simulacrum Wave 20 is a significant difficulty spike — build must be fully completed
Mirror-crafting requires hundreds of hours of currency farming to be realistic for most players
stages.unlock: Mirrors of Kalandra, Mageblood, and other ultra-rare endgame drops
stages.next_step: Build is complete — try a new league or a different build archetype

tips: Never skip lab — 4 Ascendancy points are your most powerful character upgrade.
Resistance capping (75% all) is the single most impactful gear requirement at every stage.
Run maps in bulk at whatever tier is efficient — 10 T14 maps > 1 T16 if clear speed is 3× faster.
The Atlas passive tree is permanent per league — spec into what you will actually run, not what sounds exciting.
Check the Quest Tracker tab to make sure you have all passive skill points before finishing the campaign.
